description_long: This humanoid robot features a skeletal, exoskeleton-like frame with articulated limbs and a segmented torso. The arms are extended horizontally and appear to have multiple joints, allowing for a wide range of motion. The legs are long and mechanical, with visible hinges at the knees and ankles, and end in open, foot-like structures designed for stability. The torso is compact and reinforced, with a central spine-like structure and mechanical components visible throughout. The robot is primarily constructed from dark metallic materials, accented with yellow and orange highlights, and has a utilitarian, industrial appearance. There are no visible coverings or decorative elements, and the head area is minimalistic, lacking distinct facial features.
description: A skeletal, industrial humanoid robot with articulated limbs, a segmented torso, and open mechanical feet, primarily dark metal with yellow and orange accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the outstretched arms, segmented torso, and symmetrical mechanical legs with open feet.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thin profile, visible arm and leg joints, and the spine-like structure of the torso.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the torso, additional mechanical details, and the symmetrical arrangement of the limbs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the arm and leg articulation and the mechanical structure from the other side.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms fully extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and parallel, torso upright, and head area facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; only integrated mechanical panels and structural components are visible.
attribute_facial_features: No visible facial features; head area is minimalistic and lacks eyes, mouth, or expressive elements.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints, allowing for significant articulation; limbs appear rigid but highly jointed.
